## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Update to an existing skill

## Checklist

- [ ] `./test/run.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck install.sh uninstall.sh test/run.sh` passes
- [ ] New/changed skill folder name matches its `name:` frontmatter
- [ ] Added a line to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
